ddls:
CREATE TABLE "domains" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each domain */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* Name of the domain */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the domain */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the domain was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the domain was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the domain the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "positive_version" TEXT /* Positive version of the question */,
  "negative_version" TEXT /* Negative version of the question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of question (e.g., multiple choice, rating scale) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the candidate */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the candidate */,
  "resume" TEXT /* Resume of the candidate */,
  "cover_letter" TEXT /* Cover letter of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate being evaluated */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question being evaluated */,
  "positive_rating" REAL /* Rating for the positive version of the question */,
  "negative_rating" REAL /* Rating for the negative version of the question */,
  "passed_screening" INTEGER /* Whether the candidate passed the initial screening */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., recruiter, interviewer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the survey was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the survey was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_questions" (
  "survey_question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey question */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the question belongs to */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question */,
  "question_order" INTEGER /* Order of the question in the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_questions_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_questions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_survey_results" (
  "candidate_survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate survey result */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate being evaluated */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the evaluation (average rating) */,
  "completed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the survey was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_survey_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_survey_results_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation the feedback belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_status" (
  "candidate_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate status entry */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the candidate (e.g., in progress, hired, rejected) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date of the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_status_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_skills" (
  "candidate_skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate skill entry */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "skill" TEXT /* Skill or qualification of the candidate */,
  "proficiency_level" TEXT /* Proficiency level of the candidate in the skill (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_skills_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_posts" (
  "job_post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job post */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job */,
  "requirements" TEXT /* Requirements of the job */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the job post was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the job post was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_job_posts" (
  "candidate_job_post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate job post entry */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "job_post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job post */,
  "applied_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the candidate applied for the job post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_job_post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_job_posts_job_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_post_id") REFERENCES job_posts ("job_post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_job_posts_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interviews" (
  "interview_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interview */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "job_post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job post */,
  "interview_date" TEXT /* Date of the interview */,
  "interview_time" TEXT /* Time of the interview */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interview_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviews_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviews_job_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_post_id") REFERENCES job_posts ("job_post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interviewers" (
  "interviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interviewer */,
  "interview_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interview */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user conducting the interview */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviewers_interview_id FOREIGN KEY ("interview_id") REFERENCES interviews ("interview_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviewers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
